name: callback
description: Job application MCP workflows for profile onboarding, resume tailoring, lead scanning, and application review.

interface.shortDescription: Tailor resumes and manage job-search workflows with callback.
interface.longDescription: callback packages an MCP server and Codex workflows for registering a resume profile, tailoring one resume for a job description, scanning job leads, reviewing application candidates, and setting up a scan-first recurring job automation.
defaultPrompt: Tailor my resume for this job.
